bcsmcds

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://cancerscreeningcds.github.io/bcsm-cds/ImplementationGuide/cancerscreeningcds.fhir.us.bcsm-cds

name: bcsmcds
title: Breast Cancer Screening and Management (BCSM) Clinical Decision Support (CDS) Implementation Guide

extension.valueMarkdown: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

resource.name: Average Risk
resource.description: Average risk logic path.

resource.name: Breast Screening Next Due Record Inference Task
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a RecordInferenceTask for screening study next due.

resource.name: Breast Screening Service Request
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a ServiceRequest for screening study.

resource.name: Communicate Eligible
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest containing information about the patient's ineligibility for screening.

resource.name: Communicate Not Eligible
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest containing information about the patient's ineligibility for screening.

resource.name: Communicate recommendation for risk assessment
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending risk assessment.

resource.name: Communicate Recommendation to refer to specialist
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending specialty referral.

resource.name: Communicate Shared Decision Making to Continue Screening
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending shared decision making on the decision to continue screening.

resource.name: Communicate Shared Decision Making to Delay Screening
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a CommunicationRequest recommending shared decision making on the decision to delay screening.

resource.name: Decision to Screen
resource.description: Decision to screen logic path.

resource.name: High Risk Exclusions
resource.description: High risk exclusions logic path.

resource.name: Plan Definition Action Code System
resource.description: Code representing plan definition action codes

resource.name: Plan Definition Action Codes
resource.description: This value set includes action codes for Plan Definitions within this implementation guide.

resource.name: Plan Definition Action Reason Code System
resource.description: Code representing plan definition action reason codes

resource.name: Plan Definition Action Reason Codes
resource.description: This value set includes action reason codes for Plan Definitions within this implementation guide.

resource.name: Primary Screening Decision
resource.description: Primary Screening Decision pathway.

resource.name: Screening Eligible
resource.description: Screening eligible logic path.

resource.name: Screening Eligible Questionnaire Task
resource.description: This ActivityDefinition generates a Questionnaire Task containing a request to complete a questionnaire.

resource.name: Screening Observation Code System
resource.description: Code representing breast cancer screening related observations

resource.name: Special Populations
resource.description: Special populations logic path.
